query: SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, ap.trilhaId, ap.turmaId, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, t.name as trilhaNome, tu.name as turmaNome FROM assessment_pdi ap LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id LEFT JOIN turmas tu ON ap.turmaId = tu.id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, ap.trilhaId, ap.turmaId, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, t.name as trilhaNome, tu.name as turmaNome FROM assessment_pdi ap LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id LEFT JOIN turmas tu ON ap.turmaId = tu.id LIMIT 20;
